nasb.text: “You shall not sacrifice to the Lord your God an ox or a sheep which has a blemish or any defect, for that is a detestable thing to the Lord your God.

esv.text: “You shall not sacrifice to the Lord your God an ox or a sheep in which is a blemish, any defect whatever, for that is an abomination to the Lord your God.

cnv.text: “有殘疾，或有甚麼缺點的牛羊，都不可獻給耶和華你的　神，因為這是耶和華你的　神所憎惡的。

ccb.text: “不可把有缺陷或残疾的牛羊献给你们的上帝耶和华，因为这是祂所憎恶的。
